name: 豆包速问
handler: return (res) => { if (!res || res.code !== 1 || !Array.isArray(res.results)) return [[undefined, '未找到答案']]; return res.results.map(i => { var ans = i.answer; if (Array.isArray(ans)) ans = ans.join('#'); if (ans == null) ans = ''; ans = String(ans).trim(); var q = i.question || ''; var blanks = (q.match(/__\d+__/g) || []).length + (q.match(/_\d+_/g) || []).length + (q.match(/[（(]\s*[)）]/g) || []).length; if (blanks >= 2 && ans.indexOf('#') < 0 && ans.indexOf('|') < 0 && ans.indexOf('\n') < 0 && /[,，、]/.test(ans)) { ans = ans.split(/[,，、]/).map(function(s){return s.trim();}).filter(Boolean).join('#'); } return [i.question, ans]; }); }
